message:
Refactor TUI screens: static methods, struct init syntax, clippy lint fixes

- explorer.rs: Make resolve_text_filter_message_ids a static method
  (remove unused &self), use struct initializer syntax with ..Default
  instead of field-by-field mutation for SearchQuery construction
- messages.rs: Use inline format argument (format!("cc: {first}"))
  instead of positional format!("cc: {}", first)
- threads.rs: Add clippy::too_many_lines allow on fetch_threads,
  use struct initializer syntax for SearchQuery (same pattern as explorer)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
